description: Reconcile a declarative Stripe catalog and inspect a Stripe account. Runs locally over stdio via `npx stripekit mcp`.

tools.name: stripekit_plan
tools.description: Preview the changes reconciling the Stripe account to stripe.config.ts would make. Read-only.

tools.name: stripekit_check
tools.description: Verify the key, config, config-vs-account drift, and webhook/portal wiring. Read-only.

tools.name: stripekit_pull
tools.description: Generate stripe.config.ts from an existing Stripe catalog. Read-only.

tools.name: stripekit_push
tools.description: Reconcile the Stripe account to stripe.config.ts. Dry-run by default; apply requires apply:true (and live:true for live mode).
